description.ko: 유동적인 에너지의 매혹적인 시각화로, 자연스러운 곡선과 빛이 수렴하여 연속적이고 리듬감 있는 움직임과 생물학적 조화를 만들어냅니다.
description.en: A mesmerizing visualization of fluid energy, where natural curves and light converge to create a sense of continuous, rhythmic motion and biological harmony.

prompt: Cinematic macro shot of iridescent fluid ribbons, translucent organic shapes weaving in a rhythmic dance, bioluminescent teal and deep violet glows, liquid silk texture, soft atmospheric lighting, ethereal motion blur, 8k resolution, hyper-realistic, organic curves.
